title: Technical Leader GenAI & GenBI Platforms
description: Déclaration de mission de l'entreprise Join us at Orange Business!We are a network and digital integrator that understands the entire value chain of the digital world, freeing our customers to focus on the strategic initiatives that shape their business.Every day, you will collaborate with a team dedicated to providing consistent, sustainable global solutions, no matter where our customers operate. With over 30,000 employees across Asia, the Americas, Africa, and Europe, we offer a dynamic environment to develop and perfect your skills in a field filled with exciting challenges and opportunities. À propos du rôle CatchlineIf ‘platform at scale’ sounds more exciting than scary, we should definitely talk.Your day-to-day missions You lead the design, deployment, and operation of GenAI platforms, ensuring their performance, scalability, and security. You collaborate closely with Data, AI, and infrastructure teams to integrate the best technologies and practices. You oversee technical developments and guide engineering teams in project execution. You maintain continuous technological watch to anticipate evolutions and address the challenges of responsible tech. You contribute to defining the technical strategy and roadmap for GenAI platforms.Skills You Will DevelopThis position offers you the opportunity to strengthen your skills in the architecture and operation of GenAI platforms, end-to-end, from build to run. You will develop your expertise in managing complex projects, in technical leadership and in operating large-scale cloud platforms, with strong performance, reliability and security requirements. You will also deepen your knowledge of responsible artificial intelligence and DevOps practices, while evolving in an agile and international environment.Experience And EducationYou have between 5 and 10 years of professional experience and hold a Master's degree (or equivalent) in a relevant field.Your Hard Skills Expertise in architecture and deployment of cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP). Strong knowledge of artificial intelligence and machine learning technologies, including generative AI. Mastery of DevOps practices and CI/CD tools. Skills in container management and orchestration (Kubernetes, Docker). Experience in platform security and data management.Your Soft SkillsWe are looking for someone with excellent communication skills, able to bring together and motivate multidisciplinary teams. You demonstrate strong rigor, agility and a high capacity to adapt, especially in a SAFe environment. Your initiative and curiosity drive you to constantly seek innovative solutions. Finally, your natural leadership allows you to support change with both kindness and assertiveness. À propos de vous Orange Business aims to grow with Data and AI platforms. The Data and AI Platforms division designs, deploys, and operates advanced platforms that transform data into strategic value through artificial intelligence. This dynamic entity fosters technical excellence and agility to meet the complex challenges of our clients on a global scale.Benefits Of The RoleYou will play a key role in defining and operating Orange Business' strategic GenAI platforms, with a direct impact on international customer projects. You will work in a high-level technical environment, with access to state-of-the-art cloud and AI technologies. You will benefit from a flexible working environment and a culture that encourages continuous learning, sharing and innovation.Career perspectivesIn the medium term, this role can open up opportunities towards technical leadership positions across all Data & AI platforms, lead roles on strategic transformation programs, or enterprise architecture functions around generative AI. You will also be able to increase your visibility within the group by acting as a reference on GenAI topics, both with internal teams and with customers.The teamYou will join an international team bringing together diverse expertise in data, AI and cloud, closely aligned with the strategic priorities of Orange Business. You will work on highly visible projects at the heart of the group's major decisions, in an environment where sharing, collaboration and technical excellence are encouraged on a daily basis.Our promiseAt Orange Business, you operate on a vast and diverse playground where GenAI, data and cloud come together at scale. You design, build and run platforms that support mission-critical use cases for customers across multiple countries and industries, with high expectations on performance, reliability and security. Surrounded by experts, you are encouraged to push the boundaries of technology, experiment, learn fast and continuously raise the bar on engineering excellence. When you want to excel on a truly global tech playground, Orange is there.You bring rigor, passion for challenges, and determination. You seek the opportunity to expand your expertise, achieve your goals, and thrive. Informations supplémentaires  Global Opportunities: Work in multi-national teams with opportunity to collaborate with colleagues and customers from all over the world. Flexible Work Environment: Flexible working hours and possibility to combine work from office and home (hybrid ways of working). Professional Development: training programs and upskilling/re-skilling opportunities. Career Growth: Internal growth and mobility opportunities within Orange. Caring and Daring Culture: Health and well-being programs and benefits, diversity & inclusion initiatives, CSR and employee connect events. Reward Programs: Employee Referral Program, Change Maker Awards. Égalité des chances en matière d'emploi Regardless of your age, gender identity, race, ethnic origin, religion/belief, sexual orientation, marital status, neuroatypia, disability, veteran status or appearance, we encourage diversity within our teams because it is a strength for the collective and a vector of innovation. Orange Group is a disabled-friendly company and equal opportunity employer: don't hesitate to tell us about your specific needs.
